description: Cross-turn echo: on the second user turn the model re-emits the first turn's long answer verbatim (weak models copy the prior assistant message out of history; observed with qwen2.5:3b, see docs/solutions weak-model-runtime-robustness-2026-06-07). The answer is >= 200 chars so the echo guard is armed (_MIN_ECHO_LENGTH); the second delivery is suppressed to _REPEATED_RESPONSE_FALLBACK. Pinned by tests/unit/test_agent_runtime.py::TestRepeatedResponseSuppressed.
user_messages: what else can you help me with?

turns.content: I'm a specialized maintenance assistant powered by the Machina framework. I can help with equipment information, maintenance history, procedures and manuals, failure diagnosis, spare parts, work orders, and maintenance schedules. What shall we do today?
